description: Triager agent step schemas. Two-step pipeline: triage (work, stepKind=work) classifies unlabeled issues and applies kind:*/order:N labels via gh, then hands off to closure.triage.record-kind (stepKind=closure) which persists per-issue kind labels to .agent/out/kind_at_triage/<N>.txt as a durable kind-at-triage source of truth. Orchestrator never sees triager verdicts — triager bypasses the workflow loop (see .agent/CLAUDE.md).

triage.description: Triage work step response. Classifies each open, unlabeled issue into kind:impl|kind:consider|kind:design and assigns a unique order:N work-order. Hands off to closure.triage.record-kind via the 'handoff' intent to freeze the kind decision on disk.

summary.description: One-line human-readable summary of the triage outcome.

action.description: Work-step intent. 'handoff' transitions to closure.triage.record-kind (the canonical path after labeling). 'repeat' re-runs triage when the initial fetch/classification needs another pass (e.g., paging, transient gh failure).

assignments.description: Per-issue classification results from this triage run. Empty array is valid (no eligible issues found). Each entry reflects a successful 'gh issue edit --add-label kind:<K>,order:<N>' application.

kind.description: Classification outcome; drives downstream dispatch in the execute workflow.

order.description: Assigned work-order label; unique within this triage run.

remaining_capacity.description: Unused order:N slots after this run. 0 means triage is at capacity and further triage is deferred until the execute workflow drains one.

closure.triage.record-kind.description: Record-kind closure response. Persists every (issue, kind) pair from the prior triage step into .agent/out/kind_at_triage/<N>.txt (one line per issue, refuse-to-overwrite). Non-empty kind_conflicts triggers a 'repeat' back to this step so a human can reconcile; an empty conflicts array emits 'closing' to terminate triage.

action.description: Closure intent. 'closing' terminates triage (all kinds recorded or already matched). 'repeat' requests another pass because kind_conflicts is non-empty and needs human reconciliation before the step can complete.

kind_conflicts.description: Issues whose existing .agent/out/kind_at_triage/<N>.txt content disagrees with this run's classification. Empty array = no conflicts = safe to 'closing'.

recorded.description: Kind already frozen on disk from a prior run.

classified.description: Kind this run assigned — differs from `recorded`, hence the conflict.
